title: No Roman Numerals [NRN]
description: This mod removes Roman numerals from the game and replaces them with Arabic numerals. It even changes the hardcoded Beacon numeral.
body:
# Information

This lightweight client-side mod removes Roman numerals for enchantments and potions and replaces them with Arabic numerals, up to level 255.
This mod even changes the hardcoded Roman 2 inside of Beacons.

This mod has a [sister mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-roman-numerals/) that adds Roman numerals for up to level 255.

# Resource Pack Version

+ [No Roman Numerals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-roman-numerals-resource-pack) (This doesn't support Beacons)
